code: import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL='http://localhost:8080/students';const studentApi=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL});export const getStudents=()=>studentApi.get('/');export const addStudent=student=>studentApi.post('/',student);export const updateStudent=(id,student)=>studentApi.put(`/${id}`,student);export const deleteStudent=id=>studentApi.delete(`/${id}`);
